title: FWStyle 1 Drawer Corner TV Unit – Hudson Ready Assembled Natural Ash Wooden Media Cabinet with Storage Drawer & Open Shelf – Solid Wood Ash Veneer TV Stand with Cable Management
features: Space-Saving Corner Design – The Hudson Natural Ash Corner TV Unit is designed to maximise your living space, fitting neatly into corners while providing a stylish media solution.
Durable & Timeless Finish – Crafted from solid ash, MDF, and ash veneers with a natural lacquered finish for long-lasting durability and a classic look that complements any décor.
Ample Storage Options – Includes a large full-width drawer with polished metal knob handles, perfect for storing remote controls, DVDs, or gaming accessories.
Open Plan Shelf – Features a spacious open shelf ideal for housing media devices, soundbars, or games consoles, keeping your entertainment essentials within easy reach.
Integrated Cable Management – Built-in cable routing holes help keep wires neat and organised, creating a clean and clutter-free living room setup.
Delivered Ready Assembled – No flat-pack hassle; your TV unit arrives fully assembled, ready to use straight out of the box.
Compact & Practical Size – Perfect for modern living spaces with dimensions: H 50.5cm x W 85cm x D 50cm.
description: Upgrade your entertainment space with the FWStyle Hudson 1 Drawer Corner TV Unit in Natural Ash, a perfect balance of practicality and contemporary style. Designed to fit neatly into corners, this compact yet spacious unit maximises your living room layout while keeping your entertainment setup organised. Expertly crafted from solid ash, MDF, and ash veneers, this TV stand features a natural lacquered finish that highlights the wood’s natural grain, bringing warmth and elegance to your home. The unit includes a deep full-width drawer, perfect for tidying away DVDs, gaming controllers, and accessories, while the open shelf provides easy access to set-top boxes, consoles, or streaming devices. Thoughtfully designed with cable management holes, the Hudson TV unit keeps wires and cords neatly hidden, helping you maintain a clutter-free living space. The polished metal knob handles add a sophisticated finishing touch, making this unit both practical and stylish. Delivered ready assembled, there’s no need for tools or complicated instructions—simply unbox and enjoy your new furniture right away. Measuring H 50.5cm x W 85cm x D 50cm, it’s perfectly sized for modern homes, offering reliable storage and display space without overwhelming your room. With its blend of durability, elegance, and functionality, the FWStyle Hudson Corner TV Unit is the ideal addition to any living space.

specifications_table.Capacity: ‎H 51 cm x W 85 cm x D 50 cm
